Executes an engineering calculation via the Python engine, saves the result and returns it.

**Supported types:** BASIC-001, BASIC-002, BASIC-003, BASIC-004, BASIC-005, CABLE-001, CABLE-002, CABLE-003, CABLE-004, CABLE-005, TRF-001, TRF-002, TRF-003, TRF-004, TRF-005, PROT-001, PROT-002, PROT-004, PROT-005, SC-001, GND-001, ARC-001, PQ-001, PQ-002, PQ-003, PQ-004, PQ-005, PQ-006, CAP-001, PS-001, PS-002, PS-003, PS-004, SWT-001, LIGHT-001, LIGHT-002, GND-002, MOT-002, BATTERY-002, SOLAR-002, SOLAR-003, BAT-BU-001, PFC-001, HARM-001, ECO-001, ECO-002, ECO-003

createdBy.description: ID of user who created the workspace

updatedBy.description: ID of last user who updated the workspace

userId.description: UUID of the user to add

password.description: Password (min 8 chars, with uppercase, lowercase, number, special char)

permissionIds.description: Array of permission UUIDs to assign to the role

slug.description: Unique permission slug in format: domain.action

domain.description: Domain name: identity | workspace | projects | engineering | ai | marketplace | storage | api | admin

type.description: Calculation type code (e.g. BASIC-001 = Ohm's Law)

inputs.description: Calculation inputs — structure depends on calculation type

projectId.description: Optional project ID to associate the calculation with

content.example: چطور THD جریان را کاهش دهم؟

title.example: Short-circuit currents in three-phase AC systems
Short-circuit currents in three-phase AC systems

secret.description: Secret for HMAC signature (auto-generated if empty)

planId.description: Scope to a plan ID (null = global)

workspaceId.description: Scope to a workspace ID (overrides plan scope)

planId.description: New plan scope (null = remove plan scope)

workspaceId.description: New workspace scope (null = remove workspace scope)

chunkTextExcerpt.description: Excerpt of the matching chunk text

query.description: Query or request for the agent

sessionId.description: Existing session ID for continuing conversation
